name: @youchaoyun/plugin-timeline
description: Provide users with the ability to display data records along a time dimension. Through an intuitive timeline view, it helps users clearly sort out event sequences and track changes in data.
description.zh-CN: 为用户提供以时间维度展示数据记录的能力。通过直观的时间轴视图，帮助用户清晰地梳理事件脉络、追踪数据变化。
